metadata.title: João Gabriel Lima | Web Developer & Product Builder
metadata.description: I design and build web products end to end: UX, front-end, and production-ready delivery. Browse projects, experience, and how to reach me.

hero.sub: Modern interfaces, high performance and a focus on what matters: shipping things that actually works.
hero.formSuccess: Thanks — I got your message and will get back to you soon.
hero.formError: Could not send right now. Please try again or email me directly.

contactForm.name: Name
contactForm.messageHint: A few words or more—enough to describe your request.
contactForm.success: Thanks — I will reply as soon as I can.
contactForm.error: Could not send. Check your connection or try email instead.

contact.metaTitle: Contact João Gabriel Lima | Web developer
contact.metaDescription: Contact João Gabriel Lima for web development, product work, or collaborations. Use the form to send your name, email, and message—replies usually within a few business days.
contact.heading: Contact
contact.introP1: Use this page to reach out about projects, roles, or partnerships. Whether you need a product built, help shipping to production, or a technical conversation, send a short note and I will get back to you.
contact.introP2: I read every message myself. For the fastest reply, include what you are looking for and any useful context (timeline, stack, or links).
contact.formIntro: Enter your name and email, write a few lines (at least one short sentence), then press send. You will see a confirmation here when it goes through.

designSystem.heading: Design system
designSystem.intro: Foundations, tokens, and shadcn/ui primitives for this site. For author reference; not in the main navigation.
designSystem.brandBody: Hero-style gradient; single utility class to keep copy consistent.
designSystem.spacingNote: Follows Tailwind’s default scale; rem values match spacing-* utilities.
designSystem.radiusNote: The base --radius in globals.css drives shadcn components (e.g. buttons, cards).
